'''bagozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantiomerism|enantiomerism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-g-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantiomerism|enantiomerism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bagozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bægezeth|bægezeth]] || [[word:bægezej|bægezej]] || [[word:bægezesh|bægezesh]] || [[word:bægeze|bægeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bagogozoth|bagogozoth]] || [[word:bagogozoj|bagogozoj]] || [[word:bagogozosh|bagogozosh]] || [[word:bagogozo|bagogozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bagozoth|bagozoth]] || [[word:bagozoj|bagozoj]] || [[word:bagozosh|bagozosh]] || [[word:bagozo|bagozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bagofzoth|bagofzoth]] || [[word:bagofzoj|bagofzoj]] || [[word:bagofzosh|bagofzosh]] || [[word:bagofzof|bagofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bagozotho|bagozotho]] || [[word:bagozojo|bagozojo]] || [[word:bagozosho|bagozosho]] || [[word:bagozoko|bagozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bagozoth|bagozoth]] || [[word:bagozoj|bagozoj]] || [[word:bagozosh|bagozosh]] || [[word:bagozo|bagozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bagozothol|bagozothol]] || [[word:bagozojol|bagozojol]] || [[word:bagozoshol|bagozoshol]] || [[word:bagozokol|bagozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bagozothotho|bagozothotho]] || [[word:bagozojojo|bagozojojo]] || [[word:bagozoshosho|bagozoshosho]] || [[word:bagozoko|bagozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bagozothon|bagozothon]] || [[word:bagozojon|bagozojon]] || [[word:bagozoshon|bagozoshon]] || [[word:bagozokon|bagozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bagozothoro|bagozothoro]] || [[word:bagozojoro|bagozojoro]] || [[word:bagozoshoro|bagozoshoro]] || [[word:bagozokoro|bagozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
